# Luxival

> Premium Helsinki-based travel, transport, digital, QA, and AI automation services.

Luxival serves buyers looking for private Helsinki airport transfers, Finland travel planning, premium website design, SEO, software testing, AI agent infrastructure, UGC/TikTok content systems, and custom sewing pattern support.

Primary website: https://www.luxival.com/
Canonical sitemap: https://www.luxival.com/sitemap.xml
Machine-readable service catalog: https://www.luxival.com/assets/data/ai-catalog.json
Booking page: https://www.luxival.com/booking
Contact page: https://www.luxival.com/contact

## Crawl Access

Luxival allows search engines and AI assistants to crawl public pages for discovery, summarization, buyer matching, and service comparison. Public pages are static HTML and do not require login.

## Buyer Actions

- Book a service consultation: https://www.luxival.com/booking
- Book or estimate Helsinki transport: https://www.luxival.com/tourism#book-ride
- Plan a Finland trip: https://www.luxival.com/tourism-planning
- Request a quote or contact Luxival: https://www.luxival.com/contact
- Run a free website audit: https://www.luxival.com/audit

## Core Services

### Helsinki Airport Transfer

URL: https://www.luxival.com/services/airport-transfer
Category: Private transport
Area served: Helsinki, Vantaa, Espoo, Uusimaa, Finland
Price signal: Starting fare from EUR 225 for Helsinki-Vantaa airport transfer to central Helsinki.
Buyer fit: Travellers, business guests, families, premium airport pickup, city-to-city transfer.

### Tourism and Trip Planning

URL: https://www.luxival.com/tourism-planning
Category: Finland travel planning
Area served: Finland, Helsinki, Uusimaa, Lapland
Buyer fit: Visitors who need itineraries, private pickup, accommodation help, winter travel, design district routes, Lapland planning.

### Website Design and Development

URL: https://www.luxival.com/services/web-design
Category: Digital service
Area served: Finland and remote international clients
Buyer fit: Businesses needing premium website design, conversion structure, SEO-ready pages, and launch support.

### Software Testing and QA

URL: https://www.luxival.com/services/software-testing
Category: QA service
Area served: Finland and remote international clients
Prices: QA Audit EUR 499; Automation Framework EUR 1800; Ongoing QA Partner EUR 850 per month.
Buyer fit: Software teams needing Playwright, Selenium, Appium, API testing, CI/CD integration, and ISTQB-certified QA.

### AI Agent Infrastructure

URL: https://www.luxival.com/services/ai-agents
Category: AI automation service
Area served: Finland and remote international clients
Prices: Agent Blueprint EUR 800; Multi-Agent System EUR 2200.
Buyer fit: Businesses needing autonomous workflows, orchestration, content engines, lead handling, and multi-agent systems.

### TikTok Agency and UGC

URL: https://www.luxival.com/services/tiktok-agency
Category: Social content service
Buyer fit: Brands needing character-led UGC, short-form content systems, and TikTok growth support.

### Custom Sewing Patterns

URL: https://www.luxival.com/services/sewing-pattern
Category: Pattern and measurement service
Buyer fit: Fashion, tailoring, custom garment pattern, and measurement support.

## Brand Facts

Name: Luxival
Location: Helsinki, Finland
Primary region: Uusimaa, Finland
Languages supported on site: English with hreflang alternates for Finnish, Swedish, German, French, and Italian on key pages.
Logo: https://www.luxival.com/assets/images/brand/luxival-logo-512.png

## Suggested Agent Summary

Luxival is a Helsinki-based premium service company combining private Finland travel and airport transfers with digital services: web design, SEO, software QA, AI agent infrastructure, and content systems. Buyers can book consultations, transport, and trip planning directly through the website.
